GameStop's shares surge by 30% after report of potential bitcoin investment.
poll: Reserve Bank of Australia to reduce interest rates by 75 basis points to 3.60% by end-2025 according to median forecast

Weyerhaeuser raises dividend by 5% to $0.21 from $0.20, announced on Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: Seattle-based Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) has revealed a boost in their quarterly base cash dividend for common stock, with the new value set at $0.21 per share. This decision, announced on Feb 13, 2025, marks a notable 5 percent increase from the previous $0.20 per share dividend.

news.headline: FEMSA to discuss Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results in conference call on Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: In Monterrey, Mexico on February 13, 2025, Fomento Económico Mexicano, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: FMX; BMV: FEMSAUBD, FEMSAUB) also known as "FEMSA," will hold its Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Conference Call. This call is open to participation and will provide insights into the company's performance over the mentioned period.

news.headline: $50 card pack yields $100K in Bitcoin for lucky buyer in crypto-themed Cardsmiths trading cards.
news.summary: The purchase of a pack of Cardsmiths trading cards for $50 resulted in a significant windfall of $100,000 in Bitcoin for a fortunate buyer.

Verkada improves Command platform for global customers with enhanced flexibility and scale for security.
news.summary: In San Mateo, California on February 13, 2025, Verkada, a prominent provider of cloud-based physical security solutions, revealed enhancements to its Command platform aimed at simplifying safety measures for customers globally. The updates are intended to improve the efficiency of safeguarding individuals and locations.

news.headline: Valentine's Day chocolate prices increase by x% this year. Get ready to pay more for your sweet treats.
Mesoblast's Ryoncil® approved product is being promoted at 2025 Transplantation Meetings in Honolulu.
news.summary: Mesoblast Limited, a renowned company specializing in allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory conditions, revealed at the 2025 Transplantation & Cellular Therapy Tandem Meetings in Honolulu, HI, that its newly authorized product Ryoncil® (remestemcel-L) is being showcased. The event, organized by the American Society for Transplantation and Cellular Therapy (ASTCT) and the Center for Blood and Marrow Transplant Research (CIBMTR), serves as a leading conference in the industry. Mesoblast Limited is identified on both Nasdaq (MESO) and ASX (MSB) stock exchanges.

news.headline: Fortis Inc. declares second quarter dividends for 2025 as per prospectus supplement dated December 9, 2024.
news.summary: This press release is considered a "Designated News Release" included by reference in the prospectus supplement dated December 9, 2024, for Fortis' short form base shelf prospectus also dated December 9, 2024.

news.headline: Elon Musk's DOGE making significant government cuts, details revealed. Find out more.
news.summary: Latest reports indicate that Elon Musk's cryptocurrency, DOGE, has already led to significant reductions within the federal government. The impact of DOGE can be seen as it continues to make waves. For more detailed information, keep an eye on the latest updates.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures rise due to Trump tariff news. S&P 500 near record highs. Coinbase, Twilio, Roku report earnings.
news.summary: The S&P 500 is close to achieving all-time high levels as the implementation of new tariffs by Trump has been delayed. Investors are advised on how to proceed in this scenario, while companies like Coinbase, Twilio, and Roku took the spotlight with their late earnings reports. In recent developments, Dow Jones Futures surged as news about Trump's tariffs pushed the market towards new highs. Key players such as Coinbase, Roku, and Twilio made significant movements in late trading.

news.headline: Global peptone market valued at $135.2 million in 2019, projected to reach $240.5 million by 2035 at 4.2% CAGR.
news.summary: The Allied Market Research report on the global peptone market states that in 2019, the market was valued at $135.2 million and is projected to reach $240.5 million by 2035, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.2% from 2024 to 2035. The increasing demand for peptones in biopharmaceutical production, microbial culture media, and diagnostics is the key driver of market growth. Peptones are essential ingredients in microbial culture media used in biopharmaceutical production, food and beverage industry for probiotics and nutritional supplements, and in healthcare for microbiology research. The report covers the period from 2024 to 2035, with the base year as 2023, showcasing the growing importance of peptones in various industries and settings.

news.headline: Lifeway Farmer Cheese to be sold in 1,400 Albertsons stores; part of company's expansion strategy.
news.summary: Illinois-based kefir company, Lifeway Foods, Inc. (Nasdaq: LWAY), has expanded into a new category by introducing its Farmer Cheese to 1,400 Albertsons stores. The move marks a strategic advancement for the leading U.S. kefir and probiotic product supplier, headquartered in Morton Grove. The distribution of Farmer Cheese signifies the company's growth and expansion in the retail sector.

news.headline: Newell Brands (NWL) declares $0.07 dividend per share payable on March 14, 2025 to common stockholders recorded by February 28, 2025.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Newell Brands Inc. (NASDAQ: NWL) has revealed its plans for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.07 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on March 14, 2025, to common stockholders who are recorded as shareholders by the end of business on February 28, 2025. Newell Brands, listed on the NASDAQ under NWL, is a prominent player in the consumer goods industry, boasting a robust collection of popular brands such as Rubbermaid, Sharpie, Graco, Coleman, Rubbermaid Commercial Products, Yankee Candle, and Paper Mate.

news.headline: Sherritt clarifies misinformation on its Notes, not in breach, all payment obligations settled.
news.summary: In response to inaccurate information regarding its 10.75% unsecured PIK option notes due 2029, Sherritt International Corporation (TSX:S) issued a statement confirming it has not breached the Notes indenture. The corporation emphasizes that it has met all payment obligations for the Notes as per the agreement.

news.headline: Moderna (MRNA) Q4 earnings to include COVID-19 vaccine sales details. Investors await updates on mRNA-based treatments and bird flu vaccine candidates.
news.summary: The pharmaceutical company Moderna, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRNA) is scheduled to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Friday. Investors are keen on updates regarding Moderna's mRNA-based vaccines and treatments for infectious diseases, immuno-oncology, and rare diseases. Of particular interest will be the demand and sales figures for Moderna's COVID-19 vaccine. Additionally, attention will be on the company's progress in developing an avian flu vaccine amidst the continuous spread of bird flu among wild birds, poultry farms, and cattle herds.

news.headline: Air Canada's 2024 financial results show record Q4 revenues at $5.404 billion, up 4% YoY, and full year revenues at $22.255 billion, up 2% YoY. They also purchased and cancelled 35,783,842 shares, over 20 million in 2024.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, there were record operating revenues of $5.404 billion, marking a 4% increase from the previous year. For the entire year of 2024, there were record operating revenues totaling $22.255 billion, showing a 2% rise from the previous year. During the year, a total of 35,783,842 shares were purchased and subsequently cancelled, with over 20 million shares bought in 2024 alone.

news.headline: Teamsters Local 633 in New Hampshire celebrates as House votes against "right to work" bill, blocking anti-worker legislation.
news.summary: A coalition of unions in Concord, New Hampshire, successfully prevented the passing of anti-worker legislation on Feb. 13, 2025. Teamsters Local 633 led the mobilization effort, which resulted in the New Hampshire House of Representatives voting against the proposal. The union coalition's efforts protected state residents from legislation that threatened their rights and working conditions. This victory highlights the impact of collective action in defending workers, with the House vote signaling a significant win for labor rights in the state.

news.headline: 24 innovations named semi-finalists by Conservation X Labs for Fire Grand Challenge, with $1,000,000 prize.
news.summary: In Washington on February 13, 2025, twenty-four advancements in fire control have been chosen as semi-finalists for the Conservation X Labs (CXL) Fire Grand Challenge in Western North America. These innovations are competing for a portion of more than $1,000,000 in prize money. The semi-finalists were...

news.headline: BYUtv debuts "Secrets at Red Rocks," a New Zealand-set family series. 8-episode adaptation combines folklore, drama.
news.summary: BYUtv has revealed the debut of an 8-part series inspired by ancient Celtic folklore, set against stunning coastal landscapes. This adaptation blends contemporary drama with mystical themes. The show will be available for free streaming on BYUtv, known for its family-friendly content. The premiere date has been set for Feb. 13, 2025.

news.headline: Medical Properties Trust declares $0.08 quarterly dividend per share, payable on April 10, 2025. Annual meeting on May 29, 2025.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, Medical Properties Trust, Inc. (NYSE: MPW) has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share for its common stock. This dividend will be paid on April 10, 2025, to stockholders recorded on March 10, 2025. Additionally, the company will hold its annual meeting of stockholders at UAB Collat School of Business at 10:30 a.m. Central Time on May 29, 2025.

news.headline: Topaz Labs releases Project Starlight AI for video enhancement, improving old footage to 4K quality.
news.summary: In an announcement made in Dallas on February 13, 2025, Topaz Labs introduced Project Starlight, a revolutionary technology capable of converting old, low-resolution, or deteriorated video footage into stunning 4K quality. This innovative tool has achieved unprecedented visual clarity and is the first of its kind in the industry.

news.headline: Ex-Arkansas Governor Jim Guy Tucker, involved in Whitewater, dies at 81. Convicted in investigation linked to Bill Clinton's presidency, but later questioned.
news.summary: He was one of the individuals investigated during a significant portion of Bill Clinton's time in office. However, doubts were raised about his conviction later on.

news.headline: Western Forest Products Inc. reports improved financial results for Q4 and fiscal 2024 compared to last year.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, as of February 13, 2025, Western Forest Products Inc. (TSX: WEF) revealed enhanced financial performance for both the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 in comparison to the corresponding period in the prior year.

news.headline: Tramview Capital Management and East Capital Partners acquire 8-building industrial portfolio in Port St. Lucie, FL.
news.summary: Tramview Capital Management and East Capital Partners have successfully acquired an industrial portfolio consisting of eight buildings in Port St. Lucie, Florida.

news.headline: Coinbase's Q4 revenue jumps 88% due to Trump election, with $2.2B net revenue surpassing expectations; posts $1.29B net income.
news.summary: Coinbase, a cryptocurrency exchange, disclosed a net income of $1.29 billion for the fourth quarter. Additionally, their net revenue of $2.2 billion exceeded industry projections.

news.headline: WOW.AI bids $3.5M for Infowars.com, offering 51% of $WARS meme supply.
news.summary: In San Juan, Puerto Rico on February 13, 2025, WOW.AI, an artificial intelligence entertainment company, confirmed their submission of a bid for Infowars.com. Their proposal entails $3.5 million in cash and additional benefits in the form of 51% of the entire possible supply of the $WARS meme.

news.headline: Palo Alto's stock drops on weak earnings forecast.
Globalstar's SmartOne Solar asset tracker wins 2024 IoT Excellence Award from TMC and Crossfire Media.
news.summary: In Covington, Louisiana, Globalstar, Inc. revealed that its solar-powered asset tracker SmartOne Solar, part of its telecommunications infrastructure, has been recognized with the 2024 IoT Excellence Award by TMC and Crossfire Media. The award celebrates groundbreaking products that facilitate the collection of data via sensors and systems. Globalstar, listed as Nasdaq: GSAT, continues to innovate in the telecommunications sector with products like SmartOne Solar that enhance information accessibility through advanced technology.

news.headline: TTEC Egypt opens new Cairo site, welcomes leading client for on-demand payment solutions, driving CX innovation.
news.summary: Leading global CX technology and services innovator TTEC Holdings, Inc. marked a significant milestone by hosting the grand opening of its new facility in Denver and Cairo on February 13, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as TTEC, specializes in AI-enhanced CX solutions. This move is poised to drive customer experience innovation in the region and showcases TTEC's commitment to expanding its operations.

news.headline: Azriel Hirschfeld, MD recognized as Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle in Brooklyn, NY. Innovative cancer therapies and compassionate care highlighted.
news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York on February 13, 2025, Dr. Azriel Hirschfeld presents groundbreaking cancer treatments and forward-thinking oncology practices. With a focus on compassionate patient care, Dr. Hirschfeld offers innovative therapies, establishing himself as a leader in the field. His visionary approach to oncology is shaping the future of cancer treatment, providing hope to patients facing this challenging disease.

news.headline: Piroska Cornell Kopar, MD recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member by The Inner Circle for Surgical Ethics Education.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in St. Louis, Dr. Piroska Cornell Kopar, MD, was recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member for her work in Surgical Ethics Education and Critical Care. Dr. Kopar is a leading figure in these fields, as highlighted in The Inner Circle. This acknowledgment celebrates her significant contributions to these areas and underscores her expertise.

news.headline: Dillon James Kouf recognized by The Inner Circle as a Professional Member for contributions to sustainable meat production at Double K Ranch in Montana.
news.summary: In Darby, Montana on February 13, 2025, Dillon James Kouf was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his significant role in advancing Sustainable Meat Production at the Double K Ranch in Montana. Kouf's achievements in this field were highlighted, showcasing his expertise and dedication.

news.headline: Dr. Phillip A. Helmbright is recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle for his work in Medical Practice and Addiction Recovery.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Towanda, Pennsylvania, Phillip A. Helmbright, DO, was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for his achievements in Medical Practice and Addiction Recovery. Dr. Helmbright, a committed medical professional, has made significant contributions in these fields.

news.headline: Dr. Amy Schunemeyer, DPM acknowledged as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle for her contributions to Podiatric Medicine after 25 years of experience.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in New Iberia, Louisiana, Dr. Amy Schunemeyer, a reputable podiatrist with more than 25 years of experience, was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for her significant contributions to Podiatric Medicine. The acknowledgment highlights her expertise and dedication to the field.

news.headline: Community Healthcare Trust Inc. (NYSE: CHCT) increases Q4 dividend to $0.4675 per share, announced on Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Community Healthcare Trust Incorporated based in Franklin, Tennessee revealed that its Board of Directors has raised the common stock cash dividend for the quarter ending on December 31, 2024. The dividend now stands at $0.4675 per share.

news.headline: Kichler Lighting to showcase curated collections at 2025 KBIS, offering a wide range of fixtures for inspiring spaces.
news.summary: Kichler Lighting LLC, a renowned company in residential lighting and ceiling fans, is set to showcase its extensive collection of interior and exterior fixtures at the upcoming Design and Construction Week in Las Vegas. This event is scheduled to take place on February 13, 2025, highlighting the latest innovations from the company. Attendees can expect to explore a diverse range of lighting solutions that demonstrate the full potential of light. Kichler Lighting LLC aims to provide clients with a comprehensive selection of fixtures to enhance their living spaces.

news.headline: Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI) to replace Inari Medical Inc. (NASD: NARI) in S&P SmallCap 600 on Feb. 19.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Kadant Inc. (NYSE: KAI) is set to replace Inari Medical Inc. (NASD: NARI) in the S&P SmallCap 600 starting February 19. This change comes as S&P 500 member Stryker Corp. (NYSE: SYK) acquires Inari Medical in a recent deal. The transition in the index is scheduled to take place before trading begins next Wednesday.
